calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Marina R. Franco, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Kurt Link, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Debra Ann Peterson.
Default was entered against defendant on January 4, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, March 30, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Kurt Link, and against the Defaulted Defendant Debra Ann Peterson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $20,000.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - $3,23.01.
Costs - $1,765.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $24,788.01.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2010 Continued To May-05-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-03-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
